data.title: About
data.metaDescription: Christian Broberg — 30+ years of web development, software architecture, and AI-native building.
data.bio:
Hi, I'm Christian Broberg, a software architect and founder of WebHouse ApS — Denmark's first web bureau, established in 1995.

Passionate about building production-grade systems where architecture is clear, code is maintainable, and AI is a first-class development partner. Currently focused on @webhouse/cms and transitioning all WebHouse operations to modern cloud-native infrastructure.

timeline.description: Launched @webhouse/cms — AI-native, plugin-based CMS with admin UI at webhouse.app
Shifted to AI-native development. Built WHop, CodePromptMaker, DNS Manager, Cronjobs service
Took on Chief Software Architect role at Senti.Cloud — decade-long IoT platform build
Consultant in Dubai — IoT business development at M-tec Telematics, Dubai Internet City
Won European Commission Award at 5th International WWW Conference, Paris
Founded WebHouse ApS — Denmark's first web bureau
